200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Inquisitor attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 10% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health.

description 4/6

Inquisitor attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 20% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health. Inquisitor’s attacks steal 5% of the target’s maximum health for 6 sec. Maxiumum 4 of the effect. When any fighter on the battlefield dies, the Inquisitor’s maximum health increases 15% of the dead fighter’s maximum health for 10 seconds. Maximum 4 of the effect.

description 6/6

Inquisitor attacks deal additional physical damage equal to 30% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health. Inquisitor’s attacks steal 15% of the target’s maximum health for 6 sec. Maxiumum 4 of the effect. When any fighter on the battlefield dies, the Inquisitor’s maximum health increases 30% of the dead fighter’s maximum health for 10 seconds. Maximum 4 of the effect. Once in a while, the Inquisitor causes a Holy Blast in a large radius around him. All enemy fighters hit by the blast take physical damage equal to 50% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health. The Inquisitor also steals 20% of the maximum health of all affected enemy fighters for 5 seconds and unbalances them for 6 sec. They cannot dodge or make critical atttacks during this time.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Additional damage from Inquisitor attacks is dealt to a small area around the target.

description 4/6

Additional damage from Inquisitor attacks is dealt to a small area around the target. Inquisitor’s attacks also steal 20% of the target’s damage for 6 sec. Maximum 4 of the effect.

description 6/6

Additional damage from Inquisitor attacks is dealt to a small area around the target. Inquisitor’s attacks also steal 20% of the target’s damage for 6 sec. Maximum 4 of the effect. The Holy Blast deals an additional magic damage equal to 30% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When attacking the Inquisitor has a 75% chance to increase their maximum health by 2% for 6 sec.

description 4/6

When attacking the Inquisitor has a 75% chance to increase their maximum health by 2% for 6 sec. With a 75% chance when stealing health with the set ability, Inquisitor will steal health from all enemy fighters in a small radius around the target of the attack.

description 6/6

When attacking the Inquisitor has a 75% chance to increase their maximum health by 2% for 6 sec. With a 75% chance when stealing health with the set ability, Inquisitor will steal health from all enemy fighters in a small radius around the target of the attack. The Holy Blast blinds all affected enemy units for 5 seconds. Blinded enemy units miss miss with a 80% chance.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The Inquisitor’s maximum health is increased by 5% for each enemy fighter in a small radius around them.

description 4/6

The Inquisitor’s maximum health is increased by 5% for each enemy fighter in a small radius around them. The maximum health of all fighters in a small radius around the Inquisitor is increased by 10% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health value for the duration of the battle.

description 6/6

The Inquisitor’s maximum health is increased by 5% for each enemy fighter in a small radius around them. The maximum health of all fighters in a small radius around the Inquisitor is increased by 10% of the Inquisitor’s maximum health value for the duration of the battle. Holy Blast reduces the damage of all affected enemy units by 40% for 5 seconds.

Materials

Epiphany
Banner
Emblem of Honor
Stone of Protection
Consecrated Chain
Suggested gears for the set
